layers.description: Shared data types, enums, and pipeline result structures used across all modules
layers.name: Core Models

layers.description: Project configuration, rule packs, and settings
layers.name: Configuration

layers.description: Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Inference System, Bayesian aggregation, membership functions, and rule base
layers.name: Brain (Fuzzy Logic)

layers.description: LLM-powered test harness generation, invariant inference, and property generation
layers.name: Bootstrap (LLM-as-Compiler)

layers.description: Modular analysis pipeline: fast hooks, supply chain, dependencies, behavioral, IaC, commit risk, property tests, mutation, invariants, fuzz, policy, symbolic, simulation, autofix
layers.name: Analysis Layers (L0-L8)

layers.description: Code Property Graph construction, Joern-style queries, single-file and cross-file taint tracking
layers.name: CPG & Taint Analysis

layers.description: Individual analysis modules: code quality, crypto, secrets, PII, deadcode, complexity, concurrency, contracts, coverage, duplication, etc.
layers.name: Scanners & Analyzers

layers.description: Closed-loop learning: GNN-inspired scoring, active learning, rule capture, feedback stats
layers.name: Learning & Feedback

layers.description: Output formatters: HTML, SARIF, TUI dashboard, and report generation
layers.name: Report & Output

layers.description: Command-line interface, pipeline orchestrator, and IDE integration (LSP)
layers.name: CLI & Orchestration

layers.description: LLM client, process reward model, and LLM-as-oracle verification
layers.name: LLM Integration

layers.description: Test suite covering all detection layers, brain, orchestrator, and enterprise features
layers.name: Tests

layers.description: CI/CD workflows, GitHub Actions, example rules and policies, utility scripts
layers.name: Infrastructure & Examples

edges.label: both perform advanced static analysis for bug detection
unified CVE DB supports supply chain scanning

edges.description: Path-based pairing (deterministic)

nodes.name: .cron-lock
nodes.summary: MiMoCode cron job lock file preventing concurrent scheduled task execution.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore patterns for the understand-anything knowledge graph extraction, listing directories and file types to skip.

nodes.name: no_secrets_in_logs
nodes.summary: Sample Rego policy that denies log/print statements referencing secrets, passwords, or card numbers (PCI DSS compliance).

nodes.name: app
nodes.summary: Example vulnerable Python application with intentional bugs: eval() calls, credential logging, and SQL injection patterns for pipeline testing.

nodes.name: test_app
nodes.summary: Test file for the example app, using property-based testing (Hypothesis) to verify calculate_discount and get_user_data invariants.

nodes.name: find_bad_loggers
nodes.summary: Diagnostic script that finds files where logger assignment was incorrectly inserted inside docstrings during automated refactoring.

nodes.name: fix_silent_except_v2
nodes.summary: Refactoring script that replaces silent except:pass patterns with logged calls (warning for data loss, debug for optional features) across the stca package.

nodes.name: fix_silent_except
nodes.summary: Earlier version of the silent except fixer script for the stca codebase.

nodes.name: rewire_scanner_errors
nodes.summary: Script to rewire error handling in scanner modules to use proper logging instead of silent exceptions.

nodes.name: show_silent_context
nodes.summary: Diagnostic script that displays surrounding context for silent exception patterns found in the codebase.

nodes.name: survey_silent_except
nodes.summary: Survey script that catalogs all silent except:pass occurrences across the stca package with file locations.

nodes.name: PKG-INFO
nodes.summary: Python package metadata for stca-pipeline, generated by setuptools during installation.

nodes.name: __init__
nodes.summary: Root package init for STCA (Static + Test + Constraint Analysis) ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â a multi-layer deterministic bug detection pipeline with IT2 fuzzy inference aggregation.

nodes.name: advanced_secrets
nodes.summary: Advanced secret detection using TruffleHog integration, Shannon entropy analysis, and historical git scan to catch leaked credentials with verification support.

nodes.name: architecture
nodes.summary: Architecture enforcement engine that validates layer boundary constraints ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â detects when modules import across prohibited layer boundaries (e.g., controllers importing services).

nodes.name: audit
nodes.summary: Tamper-evident audit logging system using SHA-256 hash chains (blockchain-style) for SOC 2/ISO 27001/PCI-DSS compliance of all STCA actions.

nodes.name: baseline
nodes.summary: Baseline management system that enables incremental adoption by only flagging new issues ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â fingerprints known findings so legacy code doesn't block new work.

nodes.name: __init__
nodes.summary: Bootstrap utilities package ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â generates deterministic artifacts (invariants, fuzz harnesses, property tests) using LLM as a one-time compiler.

nodes.name: harness_gen
nodes.summary: Fuzz harness generator that creates Atheris-compatible fuzz test harnesses for Python functions, with LLM generation and template fallback.

nodes.name: invariant_inference
nodes.summary: Static invariant inferrer that analyzes function signatures and assertions to infer preconditions, postconditions, and type constraints.

nodes.name: property_gen
nodes.summary: Property-based test generator that creates Hypothesis tests for Python functions, with LLM-enhanced generation and template fallback.

nodes.name: __init__
nodes.summary: Brain package init ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â exposes the IT2-FIS aggregation layer: IT2FIS engine, membership functions, and fuzzy rules.

nodes.name: aggregator
nodes.summary: Deterministic aggregator that feeds findings into the IT2-FIS engine and produces (decision, confidence) pairs without LLM calls.

nodes.name: bayesian
nodes.summary: Bayesian Belief Network (BBN) that combines FIS output with multiple evidence signals (exploitability, corroboration, FP history) for second-opinion aggregation with human-readable decision traces.

nodes.name: it2_fis
nodes.summary: Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Inference System engine implementing fuzzification, rule evaluation with min/max t-norms, Karnik-Mendel type reduction, and defuzzification ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â¢ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â‚¬Å¡Ã‚Â¬ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â the deterministic brain of the pipeline.

nodes.name: membership
nodes.summary: Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Inference System (IT2-FIS) membership functions implementing triangular/trapezoidal MFs and domain-specific membership functions for severity, confidence, blast radius, exploitability, and source reliability.

nodes.name: rules
nodes.summary: The IT2-FIS rule base containing 50 hand-crafted fuzzy rules covering severity, confidence, blast radius, exploitability, and source reliability combinations to produce pass/warn/block decisions.

nodes.name: tuner
nodes.summary: FIS auto-tuner that calibrates IT2-FIS rule weights against ground-truth feedback by widening confidence bands for high-FP layers and lowering severity thresholds for high-FN layers.

nodes.name: project_tuner
nodes.summary: Per-project FIS tuning via feedback. Tracks TP/FP/FN labels per rule, computes precision/recall stats, and adjusts confidence multipliers to adapt the global FIS to each project's feedback history.

nodes.name: bug_seeds
nodes.summary: Bug-seed database containing ~100 curated CWE-specific vulnerability patterns for cross-referencing findings and boosting confidence when patterns match known vulnerability classes.

nodes.name: business_logic
nodes.summary: Business logic understanding module that extracts and verifies domain-level rules: authorization matrix, business state machines, invariants from asserts/raise-if checks, and detects docstring drift.

nodes.name: cache
nodes.summary: Function-level result caching system that stores layer analysis results keyed on function body hashes with 7-day TTL, stored in .stca-cache/ directory.

nodes.name: cli_v2
nodes.summary: v2 CLI commands registering additional stca subcommands for symbolic execution, concurrency analysis, business logic, crypto audit, IAC scanning, supply chain, dashboard, LSP, and other advanced features.

nodes.name: cli
nodes.summary: Main CLI entry point for STCA pipeline providing commands for init, check, fix, bootstrap, feedback, tuning, coverage, baseline, issue tracking, and all core analysis features.

nodes.name: IT2Membership
nodes.summary: Interval type-2 membership value as [lower, upper] in [0,1] with footprint of uncertainty, supporting t-norm (intersection) and t-conorm (union) operations.

nodes.name: SeverityMF
nodes.summary: Severity membership function with four linguistic terms: low, medium, high, critical using IT2 trapezoidal MFs.

nodes.name: ConfidenceMF
nodes.summary: Confidence membership function with three linguistic terms: uncertain, moderate, certain using IT2 trapezoidal MFs.

nodes.name: BlastRadiusMF
nodes.summary: Blast radius membership function with three linguistic terms: function, module, system using IT2 triangular MFs.

nodes.name: ExploitabilityMF
nodes.summary: Exploitability membership function with three linguistic terms: none, indirect, direct using IT2 trapezoidal MFs.

nodes.name: SourceReliabilityMF
nodes.summary: Source reliability membership function with three linguistic terms: unproven, reliable, trusted using IT2 trapezoidal MFs.

nodes.name: DecisionMF
nodes.summary: Decision output membership function with three linguistic terms: pass, warn, block using IT2 triangular MFs.

nodes.name: FeedbackEntry
nodes.summary: Data class representing a single human-labeled finding with rule_id, finding_key, kind (tp/fp/fn), and metadata.

nodes.name: RuleStats
nodes.summary: Aggregated statistics for one rule computing precision, recall, FP rate, and confidence multiplier from TP/FP/FN counts.

nodes.name: FeedbackStore
nodes.summary: Persistent JSON-backed store for feedback entries with load/save, rule stats aggregation, and summary generation.

nodes.name: ProjectTuner
nodes.summary: Project-level FIS tuner that reads feedback stats and provides confidence multipliers, suppression checks, and tuning config export.

nodes.name: FuzzyRule
nodes.summary: Data class for a single IT2 fuzzy rule with severity, confidence, blast_radius, exploitability, source_reliability premises and a decision output.

nodes.name: TuningAdjustment
nodes.summary: Data class representing a tuning adjustment for a layer with confidence band widening, severity threshold lowering, and reason.

nodes.name: BugSeed
nodes.summary: Data class for a known vulnerability pattern with CWE, name, description, pattern keywords, typical severity, exploitability, and fix difficulty.

nodes.name: AuthRule
nodes.summary: Data class representing an authorization rule extracted from code with file, line, rule_type, pattern, roles, and function.

nodes.name: AuthViolation
nodes.summary: Data class representing a detected authorization violation with file, line, rule_id, severity, description, fix, and CWE.

nodes.name: AuthMatrixExtractor
nodes.summary: Extracts authorization rules from Python decorators, JS decorators, and inline checks using regex patterns.

nodes.name: AuthViolationDetector
nodes.summary: Detects authorization violations by analyzing AST for unprotected functions and missing auth checks.

nodes.name: BusinessSMViolation
nodes.summary: Data class for business state machine violations with file, line, rule_id, severity, description, and fix.

nodes.name: BusinessStateMachineAnalyzer
nodes.summary: Analyzes business state machine patterns (order/payment/user/subscription) and checks for invalid transitions.

nodes.name: Invariant
nodes.summary: Data class for mined invariants from asserts and raise-if checks with file, line, function, expression, source, and description.

nodes.name: InvariantMiner
nodes.summary: Mines invariants from Python AST by extracting assert statements and raise-if patterns.

nodes.name: DocDrift
nodes.summary: Data class for docstring drift detection with file, line, function, claim, and mismatch.

nodes.name: DocDriftAnalyzer
nodes.summary: Analyzes drift between docstring claims and actual code behavior by extracting parameters, returns, and exceptions from docstrings.

nodes.name: ResultCache
nodes.summary: Persistent function-level result cache with SHA-256 hashing, JSON storage, TTL expiry, and index management.

nodes.name: it2_triangular
nodes.summary: Factory function creating an IT2 triangular membership function with configurable footprint of uncertainty.

nodes.name: it2_trapezoidal
nodes.summary: Factory function creating an IT2 trapezoidal membership function with configurable footprint of uncertainty.

nodes.name: encode_blast_radius
nodes.summary: Encodes blast radius string (function/module/system) to numeric value (0.0/0.5/1.0).

nodes.name: _get_default_store
nodes.summary: Returns a FeedbackStore instance using the current working directory as the store path.

nodes.name: set_default_store_path
nodes.summary: Sets the default store path for the feedback store.

nodes.name: record_feedback
nodes.summary: Convenience function to record a TP/FP/FN label for a finding.

nodes.name: get_confidence_multiplier
nodes.summary: Returns the confidence multiplier for a rule based on feedback statistics.

nodes.name: is_rule_suppressed
nodes.summary: Checks if a rule should be suppressed based on its feedback statistics.

nodes.name: get_rules
nodes.summary: Returns a copy of the global fuzzy rule base.

nodes.name: compute_adjustments
nodes.summary: Computes tuning adjustments based on per-layer precision/recall stats, widening confidence bands for high-FP layers and lowering severity thresholds for high-FN layers.

nodes.name: apply_adjustments_to_config
nodes.summary: Persists tuning adjustments into .stca.yaml under a tuning section.

nodes.name: load_tuning
nodes.summary: Loads tuning configuration from .stca.yaml.

nodes.name: cross_reference_finding
nodes.summary: Cross-references a finding against the bug-seed database by CWE and pattern keywords to find matching vulnerability patterns.

nodes.name: boost_finding_confidence
nodes.summary: Boosts a finding's confidence score when it matches a known bug seed pattern.

nodes.name: register_v2_commands
nodes.summary: Registers all v2 CLI subcommands to the main click group.

nodes.name: symbolic_cmd
nodes.summary: CLI command for running Z3 symbolic execution, abstract interpretation, and type narrowing.

nodes.name: concurrency_cmd
nodes.summary: CLI command for detecting async/concurrency bugs in Python asyncio, JS Promises, and Go channels.

nodes.name: business_logic_cmd
nodes.summary: CLI command for running business logic analysis including auth matrix, state machines, invariants, and doc drift.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main CLI entry point group for the STCA pipeline.

nodes.name: check
nodes.summary: Core CLI command that runs the full STCA analysis pipeline on a repository.

nodes.name: _generate_sbom
nodes.summary: Generates a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) from package manager files (requirements.txt, package.json, go.mod, Cargo.lock, etc.).

nodes.name: doctor
nodes.summary: CLI command that runs a comprehensive health check of the STCA installation and configuration.

nodes.name: doc_audit
nodes.summary: Documentation audit module inspired by Valknut. Checks for missing docstrings, stale docstrings, missing module docs, and counts TODO/FIXME/HACK comments as code smell indicators.

nodes.name: duplication
nodes.summary: Code duplication detection using token-based sliding window hashing (CPD-style). Tokenizes Python and text files, hashes windows of N tokens, and finds collisions to identify copy-paste bugs.

nodes.name: extra_rules
nodes.summary: Expanded security rules supplementing multi_lang.py with additional crypto, XSS, injection, and framework-specific patterns across Python, JavaScript, Go, Java, and C++.

nodes.name: feedback
nodes.summary: Feedback loop package that tracks per-layer precision/recall and captures escaped bugs. Exports StatsTracker and RuleCapture.

nodes.name: rule_capture
nodes.summary: Captures escaped bugs by generating Semgrep rule templates. When a bug escapes to production, creates a YAML rule file that L0 Semgrep will catch on future commits.

nodes.name: stats
nodes.summary: Per-layer precision/recall tracking that feeds into the IT2-FIS as source_reliability signal. Layers with high false-positive rates get downweighted; layers catching real bugs get upweighted.

nodes.name: ffi_analyzer
nodes.summary: Full cross-language FFI boundary analyzer inspired by i-CodeCNES. Detects type mismatches, buffer overflows, memory management errors, GIL violations, reference counting issues, and dangerous C function calls at the Python-to-C boundary via ctypes/cffi/pybind11/Cython.

nodes.name: flawfinder_db
nodes.summary: Curated database of dangerous C/C++ functions inspired by Flawfinder. Each function entry has risk level (1-5), CWE, explanation, and safer alternative for use by the FIS aggregation layer.

nodes.name: hotspots
nodes.summary: Security hotspot review workflow with tamper-evident audit trail. Tracks hotspots through detection, review, and time-decay re-review cycles with cryptographic chaining for compliance.

nodes.name: html_scanner
nodes.summary: HTML/config security scanner that detects missing CSP headers, hardcoded secrets in .env files, security misconfigs in build configs, and devtools in production package.json.

nodes.name: iac_scanner
nodes.summary: Infrastructure as Code scanner covering Terraform, Dockerfile, Kubernetes, CloudFormation, Helm, and Pulumi. Detects misconfigurations like public S3 buckets, open security groups, and privileged containers.

nodes.name: impact_analysis
nodes.summary: Impact analysis inspired by gossiphs. Builds a call graph from AST, computes blast radius for changed functions (direct/transitive callers), and identifies affected test files.

nodes.name: incremental
nodes.summary: Incremental scanning engine with file-level content-hash caching, Python import dependency tracking, differential analysis, watch mode, and parallel scanning via ProcessPoolExecutor.

nodes.name: installer
nodes.summary: Tool auto-installer that downloads and installs external tools (gitleaks, semgrep, opa, kani, mutmut, atheris) with SHA256 verification. Supports Python pip tools and Go/Rust binary downloads.

nodes.name: interprocedural
nodes.summary: Advanced interprocedural taint analysis engine combining function summary generation, cross-file call resolution, branch constraint tracking, and trace caching. Supports Python, JavaScript, Go, Java, and C/C++.

nodes.name: issue_store
nodes.summary: SQLite-backed issue store for finding lifecycle and trend tracking. Tracks issue states (open/confirmed/fixed/wontfix/baselined), history, and trend data for stca trend reporting.

nodes.name: js_cpg
nodes.summary: JavaScript/TypeScript Code Property Graph for cross-file taint tracking using tree-sitter. Detects XSS, eval injection, and command injection across JS/TS/JSX/TSX files with source/sink detection.

nodes.name: js_multiline
nodes.summary: Multi-line pattern matcher for JS/TS files using re.DOTALL. Catches 12 patterns that span multiple lines (token before role check, async issues, etc.) that line-based scanners miss.

nodes.name: js_pattern_scanner
nodes.summary: Dedicated JavaScript/TypeScript regex-based pattern scanner for JSX/TSX files where semgrep has known issues. Covers 20+ audit findings including hardcoded keys, JWT in localStorage, and XSS patterns.

nodes.name: js_quality
nodes.summary: JS code quality analyzer computing cyclomatic complexity, toxicity scores, Halstead volume, nesting depth, parameter count, and file health grades without requiring a JS parser.

nodes.name: jsx_auth
nodes.summary: JSX-aware authorization extraction for React/Next.js codebases. Detects HOC patterns, hooks, component wrappers, permission checks, and route guards to find pages missing auth.

nodes.name: knowledge_base
nodes.summary: Builtin function behavior database inspired by Kunlun-M. Stores per-function taint metadata (passthrough, safe, source, sink) for interprocedural analysis across multiple languages.

nodes.name: layers
nodes.summary: Pipeline layers package. Imports and exports all analysis layers (L0-L7) and the ALL_LAYERS set for pipeline orchestration.

nodes.name: base
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for all pipeline layers. Defines the LayerBase interface with the run() method contract: given repo root, hunks, and config, return Findings. Layers are independent and idempotent.

nodes.name: l0_fast
nodes.summary: L0 Fast hooks layer running in under 5 seconds. Catches hardcoded secrets (gitleaks or regex fallback), Python lint errors (ruff), and SAST patterns (semgrep or built-in mini-ruleset). Catches ~25% of real bugs without LLM.

nodes.name: CFunctionSignature
nodes.summary: Data class representing a parsed C function signature with name, return type, parameters, source file, variadic flag, and header file reference.

nodes.name: FFICall
nodes.summary: Data class representing a detected FFI call from Python to C with library, function name, arguments, inferred types, and return value tracking.

nodes.name: CExtensionSource
nodes.summary: Data class for analyzed C extension source files tracking PyInit presence, PyObject usage, GIL operations, and reference count operations.

nodes.name: FFIViolation
nodes.summary: Data class for FFI boundary violations with type, severity, location, C function context, description, fix suggestion, and CWE reference.

nodes.name: FFIUsageDetector
nodes.summary: Scans Python files for FFI calls via ctypes, cffi, pybind11, and Cython. Parses AST to extract call signatures, library references, arguments, and return type tracking.

nodes.name: CHeaderParser
nodes.summary: Parses C header files to extract function signatures. Uses regex to match function declarations and infer parameter types for cross-language type checking.

nodes.name: CExtensionAnalyzer
nodes.summary: Analyzes C extension source files (.c, .cpp, .pyx) for GIL usage patterns, reference counting operations, and PyInit entry points.

nodes.name: FFIViolationDetector
nodes.summary: Detects 10 categories of FFI violations: type mismatches, null pointers, dangerous C functions, missing error checking, string encoding, buffer size, signed/unsigned mismatch, GIL violations, refcount imbalance, and memory management issues.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Main entry point for L0 fast scanning. Orchestrates gitleaks, ruff, and semgrep execution with fallback regex patterns when tools are not installed.

nodes.name: l0b_supply_chain
nodes.summary: Layer 0b analysis: supply chain auditing for Python (pip-audit), Node.js (npm audit), Go (govulncheck), and Rust (cargo-audit) dependencies, plus EOL version detection and typosquat checking.

nodes.name: l0c_dependencies
nodes.summary: Layer 0c analysis: checks for deprecated packages, outdated Python/Node dependencies via pip-audit and npm outdated, and license compliance scanning using pip-licenses.

nodes.name: l0d_behavioral
nodes.summary: Layer 0d analysis: behavioral metrics using git history to detect hotspots (high churn + complexity), knowledge drift (single-author files), and growing complexity via AST-based cyclomatic analysis.

nodes.name: l0e_iac
nodes.summary: Layer 0e analysis: Infrastructure-as-Code scanning for Dockerfiles (latest tags, root user), Kubernetes manifests (privileged containers, host networking), Terraform (public S3), and GitHub Actions workflows (pull_request_target), plus Checkov/KICS integration.

nodes.name: l0f_commit_risk
nodes.summary: Layer 0f analysis: commit risk assessment analyzing commit size, commit time patterns, message quality, tangled changes across directories, author patterns, and recent reverts.

nodes.name: l1_property
nodes.summary: Layer 1 analysis: property-based testing using Hypothesis to generate test inputs and detect edge cases, with support for custom test discovery.

nodes.name: l2_mutation
nodes.summary: Layer 2 analysis: mutation testing to assess test quality by making small code mutations and checking if existing tests catch them, with quick heuristic mode.

nodes.name: l3_invariants
nodes.summary: Layer 3 analysis: invariant checking using a JSON invariant database to validate static invariants like non-null checks, length constraints, and boundary conditions in function bodies.

nodes.name: l4_fuzz
nodes.summary: Layer 4 analysis: fuzz testing generation using Atheris to create fuzz harnesses for Python functions, with automatic harness generation and execution.

nodes.name: l5_policy
nodes.summary: Layer 5 analysis: policy enforcement using OPA (Open Policy Agent) for Rego policy evaluation, plus static policy checks for common code policy violations.

nodes.name: l6_symbolic
nodes.summary: Layer 6 analysis: symbolic execution integration for critical paths, leveraging external symbolic execution tools to find path-based vulnerabilities.

nodes.name: l7_simulation
nodes.summary: Layer 7 analysis: concurrency simulation and race condition detection for concurrent code paths, with pytest-based concurrency test execution.

nodes.name: l8_autofix
nodes.summary: Layer 8 analysis: automatic code fix generation with built-in fix patterns for eval usage, hardcoded passwords, Docker latest tags, and bare except clauses, plus Semgrep and Ruff integration for automated remediation.

nodes.name: learning
nodes.summary: Machine learning components: code embedding similarity via TF-IDF vectors, active learning for prioritizing findings for human review, and a lightweight GNN-inspired CPG scorer that extracts features from source code graphs to rank bug likelihood.

nodes.name: llm_verify
nodes.summary: LLM-powered bug verification: generates hypotheses about potential bugs using LLM, then verifies them by constructing and running test inputs, producing VerifiedBug results with CWE classification.

nodes.name: __init__
nodes.summary: Package init for the LLM module, re-exporting client and PRM scorer components.

nodes.name: client
nodes.summary: LLM client for local API communication: supports availability checking, prompt-based generation via HTTP POST to a local LLM endpoint, and structured finding review with JSON response parsing.

nodes.name: prm
nodes.summary: Process Reward Model scorer: evaluates LLM reasoning steps by analyzing logical connectives, step dependencies, claim consistency, and evidence grounding to produce step-level and overall quality scores.

nodes.name: __init__
nodes.summary: Package init for the LSP (Language Server Protocol) module.

nodes.name: server
nodes.summary: LSP server implementation providing real-time code analysis in editors: handles initialize, textDocument/didOpen/didChange/didSave notifications, with debounced analysis and diagnostic publishing for nullness, JS patterns, and code quality issues.

nodes.name: malicious_patterns
nodes.summary: Malicious code pattern detection: scans source files for backdoor indicators, obfuscation, data exfiltration, privilege escalation, reverse shells, and other supply-chain attack patterns using regex-based indicators.

nodes.name: maven_cve_db
nodes.summary: Maven CVE database and pom.xml scanner: parses Maven version ranges, maintains a cached CVE database updated from OSV, and scans pom.xml files for vulnerable dependencies including Spring Boot BOM version resolution.

nodes.name: metamorphic
nodes.summary: Metamorphic testing: classifies functions by type (sorting, hashing, string manipulation, math, compression, etc.), generates metamorphic test relations (determinism, idempotence, commutativity) using Hypothesis, and runs them to detect behavioral violations.

nodes.name: missing_patches
nodes.summary: Missing patch detection: scans codebases against a database of known vulnerable code patterns and their patched counterparts to identify unpatched CVEs in source code.

nodes.name: models
nodes.summary: Core data models: defines Severity, Category, BlastRadius, Decision, LayerID, Finding, AggregatedDecision, DiffHunk, PipelineResult, and LayerStats dataclasses that form the pipeline's type system and serialization layer.

nodes.name: modern_attacks
nodes.summary: Scans for modern attack surfaces including LLM/AI, GraphQL, WebSocket, SSE, gRPC, and WebRTC using curated regex patterns.

nodes.name: multi_lang
nodes.summary: Multi-language pattern framework providing regex-based pattern matching for Python, JS/TS, Go, Java, and C/C++ without writing per-language AST parsers.

nodes.name: nullness
nodes.summary: Sound nullness analysis for Python (NilAway-inspired) with path-sensitive inter-branch tracking to detect potential None dereference bugs.

nodes.name: orchestrator
nodes.summary: Central pipeline orchestrator that runs analysis layers in parallel, aggregates results via IT2-FIS fuzzy logic, optionally invokes LLM tie-breaker, and produces PipelineResult.

nodes.name: pii_detection
nodes.summary: Detects personally identifiable information (PII) such as emails, phone numbers, SSNs, and credit card numbers in source code.

nodes.name: pre_commit
nodes.summary: Pre-commit hook that runs STCA analyzers on staged files with time budget enforcement for quick feedback.

nodes.name: precision
nodes.summary: Precision pipeline implementing corroboration boosting, false-positive learning (FPLearner), and confidence calibration to reduce noise.

nodes.name: profiles
nodes.summary: Profile management system for configuring severity thresholds, disabled rules, path filters, and block-on settings per project.

nodes.name: pysa_integration
nodes.summary: Integration with Meta's Pysa static analyzer for cross-file taint analysis on Python projects.

nodes.name: report
nodes.summary: Report subpackage initialization, re-exporting HTML, SARIF, and TUI report generation modules.

nodes.name: dashboard
nodes.summary: Generates interactive HTML dashboards with severity breakdowns, category charts, top files/rules, and finding details.

nodes.name: html
nodes.summary: Generates static HTML reports from PipelineResult with severity color-coding, timing tables, and decision summaries.

nodes.name: sarif
nodes.summary: Generates SARIF (Static Analysis Results Interchange Format) JSON reports for CI/CD integration and GitHub code scanning.

nodes.name: tui
nodes.summary: Renders pipeline results to terminal using Rich library with panels, tables, trees, and colored severity/decision styles.

nodes.name: root_cause
nodes.summary: Root cause analysis that clusters findings by file, CWE, and scanner source to identify systemic issues.

nodes.name: rule_compiler
nodes.summary: LLM-assisted rule compiler that generates Semgrep rules from function code, mutates functions for verification, and validates rules against mutants.

nodes.name: rule_config
nodes.summary: Per-rule configuration management supporting severity overrides, path-based activation/deactivation, and custom parameters.

nodes.name: rule_dsl
nodes.summary: Custom rule authoring DSL with YAML-like syntax, supporting pattern matching, $META captures, ellipsis wildcards, and rule testing.

nodes.name: rule_miner
nodes.summary: Mines git history for bug-fix commits and auto-generates Semgrep rules from the diff, learning from past mistakes.

nodes.name: rules
nodes.summary: Rules package providing built-in rule pack management, language-to-pack mapping, and external pack pulling.

nodes.name: source_discovery
nodes.summary: Discovers taint sources (user input, request params, env vars) across multiple languages using regex patterns.

nodes.name: state_machine
nodes.summary: State machine analysis that tracks resource lifecycles (connections, cursors, locks) and detects missing closes or illegal transitions.

nodes.name: strictness
nodes.summary: Configurable strictness levels controlling which layers run, which severities are enabled, and which findings block CI.

nodes.name: supply_chain
nodes.summary: Supply chain analysis scanning dependency manifests (pip, npm, go, maven, cargo, gem, gradle, composer) for typosquats, abandoned deps, and CVEs.

nodes.name: suppressions
nodes.summary: Supports inline suppression comments (// stca-ignore, # nosec) to exclude specific findings from reports.

nodes.name: Orchestrator
nodes.summary: Main orchestrator class running 20+ analysis layers (nullness, consistency, PII, contracts, architecture, taint, typestate, etc.) in parallel with caching, baseline diffing, and LLM tie-breaking.

nodes.name: NullnessAnalyzer
nodes.summary: AST-based nullness analyzer with guard collection, deref tracking, and path-sensitive inter-branch analysis.

nodes.name: FPLearner
nodes.summary: Learns false-positive patterns by rule+file location and auto-suppresses findings above a configurable threshold.

nodes.name: ConfidenceCalibrator
nodes.summary: Calibrates finding confidence scores using binned accuracy tracking across runs.

nodes.name: Rule
nodes.summary: Represents a compiled detection rule with regex pattern, language/path filters, and find_in matching logic.

nodes.name: ProfileManager
nodes.summary: Manages built-in and custom profiles with severity filtering, rule enabling/disabling, and path-based profile selection.

nodes.name: DependencyInfo
nodes.summary: Data class representing a dependency with name, version, ecosystem, license, and source repository.

nodes.name: StateMachineAnalyzer
nodes.summary: Tracks resource lifecycle transitions via AST analysis and detects illegal state changes or missing cleanup.

nodes.name: GeneratedRule
nodes.summary: Data class for LLM-generated Semgrep rules with mutation verification status.

nodes.name: RootCauseCluster
nodes.summary: Groups correlated findings by root cause with file, line, type, and description metadata.

nodes.name: symbolic
nodes.summary: Z3-based symbolic execution, interval abstract interpretation, and type narrowing analysis for detecting runtime errors and assertion violations in Python code.

nodes.name: taint_cross_file
nodes.summary: Cross-file taint flow tracking using the code property graph (CPG) to detect data flowing from source parameters to dangerous sinks across function and file boundaries.

nodes.name: taint_tracker
nodes.summary: Single-file Python taint analysis using AST walking to detect data flows from user-controlled parameters to dangerous function calls like eval, exec, and SQL.

nodes.name: tree_sitter_analyzer
nodes.summary: Multi-language AST analysis using tree-sitter for Java and Python to detect unused imports, bare except clauses, and optional type issues.

nodes.name: typestate
nodes.summary: Typestate analysis that tracks object lifecycle protocols (e.g., open/close, lock/unlock) to detect protocol violations like use-after-close and missing resource initialization.

nodes.name: unified_cve_db
nodes.summary: Unified CVE vulnerability database with SQLite caching and OSV API integration for looking up CVEs across Maven, npm, and Python ecosystems from SBOM, pom.xml, package.json, and requirements.txt files.

nodes.name: test_advanced_layers
nodes.summary: Tests for advanced detection layers including taint tracking, suppression filtering, IaC scanning (Dockerfile/K8s/Terraform/GHA), commit risk analysis, brain tuner adjustments, and autofix transformations.

nodes.name: test_cache
nodes.summary: Tests for the ResultCache module covering cache misses, put/get operations, keying by function body and layer, invalidation, and stats.

nodes.name: test_detection_frontier
nodes.summary: Tests for cutting-edge detection features: CPG construction, cross-file taint tracking, typestate analysis, metamorphic testing, differential analysis, CPG queries, and LLM verification.

nodes.name: test_diff_slicer
nodes.summary: Tests for the diff slicer module: parsing unified diffs to extract files, line ranges, added/removed lines, and extracting callees from Python and JavaScript code.

nodes.name: test_enterprise_features
nodes.summary: Tests for enterprise features: entropy-based secret detection, hotspot detection/review/audit chains, audit logging with tamper detection, coverage report parsing (coverage.py/jacoco/istanbul/go), Pysa integration, and git history secret scanning.

nodes.name: test_installer
nodes.summary: Tests for the tool installer: platform ID format, tool registry completeness, layer assignments, pip installable names, GitHub repos for binary tools, and tool installation checks.

nodes.name: test_it2_fis
nodes.summary: Tests for the interval type-2 fuzzy inference system (IT2FIS): critical/low/high severity decisions, uncertainty footprint calculation, IT2 membership AND/OR operations, and footprint of uncertainty measurement.

nodes.name: test_new_detection
nodes.summary: Tests for new detection modules: missing patch scanning, contract extraction (pre/postconditions), dead code analysis, Flawfinder-style dangerous function scanning, and malicious pattern detection (base64 exec, SSH key theft, import-time subprocess).

nodes.name: test_orchestrator
nodes.summary: Tests for the brain Aggregator: no findings returns pass, critical findings block, low findings pass, high severity warns, and final decision is the maximum of individual decisions.

nodes.name: test_oss_inspired
nodes.summary: Tests for OSS-inspired features: baseline management (create/filter/update/remove), strictness levels (1-9), nullness checking, issue store CRUD, consistency detection (mixed formatting/logging/none checks), and Finding model category support.

nodes.name: test_ported_configs
nodes.summary: Tests for ported rule configuration from luacheck/detekt: built-in profiles (7 profiles), custom profile loading, profile merging, rule config management (enable/disable/severity overrides), and combined profile+rule resolution.

nodes.name: test_precision_engine
nodes.summary: Tests for the precision engine: bug-seed cross-referencing, FP learner training/prediction, confidence calibration, corroboration logic, codebase rule mining (assertions/guards/docstrings), and bug-fix commit rule generation.

nodes.name: test_scanner_health
nodes.summary: Tests for v3.1 scanner health tracking: PipelineResult health fields, error counting, JSON serialization, SARIF toolExecutionNotifications, --strict-scanners CLI gate, and orchestrator health reset between runs.

nodes.name: test_supply_chain
nodes.summary: Tests for the L0b supply chain layer: typosquat detection in requirements.txt, EOL Python version detection in Dockerfiles, and known bad package dictionary coverage.

nodes.name: stca-action
nodes.summary: Composite GitHub Action that installs STCA, runs static analysis on PRs, checks for blocking severities, and uploads SARIF results to GitHub Code Scanning.

nodes.name: stca-workflow
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs STCA on pull requests (diff-only) and pushes (full scan), uploads SARIF, and fails the build on critical findings.

nodes.name: custom-semgrep-rules
nodes.summary: Example custom Semgrep rules demonstrating how to extend STCA with user-defined patterns for Python (secret leakage, SQL injection, hardcoded passwords).

nodes.name: sample-stca-config
nodes.summary: Example STCA pipeline configuration showing layer toggles, critical/concurrency paths, block/warn severity levels, LLM settings, and output directories.

nodes.name: pyproject
nodes.summary: Python project configuration defining package metadata (stca-pipeline v0.1.0), dependencies (tree-sitter, numpy, scikit-fuzzy), optional extras (LLM, fuzz, mutation, property), CLI entry point, and pytest settings.

nodes.name: README
nodes.summary: Project documentation covering STCA Pipeline's architecture (15 analysis layers + 6 detection engines + IT2-FIS aggregation brain), CLI commands, CPG queries, typestate analysis, metamorphic/differential testing, LLM-as-oracle, detection depth comparison with commercial tools, quick start guide, and honest limits.

nodes.name: worklog
nodes.summary: Development worklog documenting P0/P1 follow-up fixes: nullness analyzer bug fix (bare function calls), silent error swallowing audit across 25 files (44 patterns replaced with logged warnings), scanner health tracking system, and CLI flags (--strict-scanners, --verbose).

nodes.name: entry-points
nodes.summary: Package entry points registering the `stca` console script pointing to stca.cli:main.

nodes.name: requires
nodes.summary: Auto-generated dependency list for the stca-pipeline package including core deps (click, rich, pyyaml, tree-sitter, numpy, scikit-fuzzy) and optional extras.

nodes.name: sources
nodes.summary: Auto-generated manifest of all source files included in the stca-pipeline package distribution.

nodes.name: top-level
nodes.summary: Auto-generated top-level package name (stca) for the installed distribution.

nodes.name: dependency-links
nodes.summary: Empty dependency links file (no external package repositories configured).

nodes.name: cpp-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for C/C++ security: 12 rules covering buffer overflows (gets, strcpy, sprintf), command injection (system), use-after-free, format string attacks, unchecked malloc, and raw pointer misuse.

nodes.name: detekt-ported
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack ported from detekt (Kotlin linter) to Python: covers complexity rules (complex conditions, long methods, too many parameters), style rules (return count, naming), and potential-bugs patterns adapted from Kotlin to Python.

nodes.name: go-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Go security: 12 rules covering shell injection (exec.Command), SQL injection (fmt.Sprintf), TLS bypass (InsecureSkipVerify), broken crypto (MD5/SHA1), hardcoded secrets, insecure randomness (math/rand), path traversal, defer-in-loop, error shadowing, and swallowed errors.

nodes.name: java-frameworks
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Java framework security: covers Spring (CSRF disabled, permitAll, actuator exposure, RequestMapping without auth), Hibernate (HQL injection, N+1 queries, lazy loading), and JPA (open-in-view) patterns.

nodes.name: java-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Java security: 12 rules covering command injection (Runtime.exec, ProcessBuilder), SQL injection, XXE, unsafe deserialization (ObjectInputStream), broken crypto (MD5/SHA1), trust-all certs, hardcoded passwords, printStackTrace leaks, busy-wait, and empty catch blocks.

nodes.name: javascript-frameworks
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for JavaScript/TypeScript framework security: covers Express.js (helmet, CORS wildcard, CSRF, body parser limits), React (dangerouslySetInnerHTML, prop drilling), Next.js (getServerSideProps SSR issues, API routes), and NestJS patterns.

nodes.name: javascript-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for JavaScript/TypeScript security: 21 rules covering injection (eval, new Function, child_process.exec), XSS (innerHTML, document.write, dangerouslySetInnerHTML), prototype pollution, TLS bypass, hardcoded secrets, JWT bypass, path traversal, SQL injection, ReDoS, info disclosure, and performance bugs.

nodes.name: lintr-ported
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack ported from lintr (R linter) to Python: covers assignment operators, brace spacing, operator spacing, quotes, semicolons, line length, indentation, naming conventions, deprecated patterns, and function complexity.

nodes.name: luacheck-ported
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack ported from luacheck (Lua linter) to Python: covers undefined globals, global access in functions, read-only violations (builtin modification), unused variables, recursive calls, redefined variables, and variable shadowing.

nodes.name: python-frameworks
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Python framework security: covers Django (raw SQL, debug mode, ALLOWED_HOSTS, CSRF, SQL injection in ORM), Flask (debug mode, Markup XSS, secret key in source), and FastAPI (dependency injection, middleware) patterns.

nodes.name: python-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for Python security: 25 rules covering injection (eval, exec, subprocess shell=True, os.system), SQL injection (f-string, string concat, %), deserialization (pickle, yaml.load, JWT), auth (hardcoded passwords/secrets, broken crypto), SSRF, path traversal, XSS (Flask Markup, Django mark_safe), info disclosure, race conditions, and business logic antipatterns.

nodes.name: react-security
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack for React/JavaScript application security: 30 rules addressing specific audit findings including JWT in localStorage (CWE-922), JSX template XSS, dangerouslySetInnerHTML, AES-ECB mode, hardcoded encryption keys, window.open without noopener, test URLs in production, hardcoded UUIDs, missing CSP, console.log sensitive data, CORS wildcard, missing auth guards, privilege escalation via default-allow, and more.

nodes.name: spotbugs-ported
nodes.summary: Semgrep rule pack ported from SpotBugs (Java linter) to Python: covers bad practice (__eq__ without __hash__, finalize without super), correctness (empty except, bare except), malicious code (mutable default args), multi-threading (GIL, race conditions), performance (unnecessary list comprehension), and security patterns.

nodes.name: code_quality
nodes.summary: Code quality analyzer with multi-language support (111+ rules across 5 languages)

nodes.name: codebase_miner
nodes.summary: Auto-rule mining from the codebase itself ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â discovers patterns and generates analysis rules

nodes.name: complexity_metrics
nodes.summary: Halstead complexity metrics and code toxicity scoring

nodes.name: concurrency
nodes.summary: Async/concurrency analysis for Python (asyncio), JS (Promises), Go (channels)

nodes.name: config_scanner
nodes.summary: Config file security scanner for Spring Boot, .env, Django, Node.js, Docker, Nginx

nodes.name: config
nodes.summary: Configuration loader for .stca.yaml ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â reads and validates project settings

nodes.name: consistency
nodes.summary: Consistency checker ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â detect inconsistent patterns across the codebase

nodes.name: contracts
nodes.summary: Design-by-contract verification inspired by life4/deal ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â checks preconditions, postconditions, invariants

nodes.name: counterfactual
nodes.summary: Counterfactual mutation testing ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â what-if analysis on code changes

nodes.name: coverage
nodes.summary: Code coverage integration ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â parse coverage reports and track trends

nodes.name: cpg_queries
nodes.summary: CPG query DSL ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â Joern-style pattern queries on the Code Property Graph

nodes.name: cpg
nodes.summary: Code Property Graph (CPG) ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â Joern-inspired AST+CFG+PDG merged graph for cross-file analysis

nodes.name: crypto_audit
nodes.summary: Cryptographic correctness analyzer ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â detects weak algorithms, hardcoded keys, insecure patterns

nodes.name: deadcode
nodes.summary: Runtime dead code analysis inspired by naver/scavenger ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â finds unreachable code paths

nodes.name: diff_slicer
nodes.summary: Tree-sitter based diff slicing ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â parses git diffs into structured analysis units

nodes.summary: Differential testing ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â find bugs by comparing two implementations

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand STCA ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â a deterministic-first bug detection pipeline with 15 analysis layers, a fuzzy logic brain, and CPG-based cross-file taint tracking.

tour.title: Entry Point & CLI
tour.description: The CLI (stca check) is the main entry point. It reads .stca.yaml config, slices the git diff, and orchestrates the full analysis pipeline.

tour.title: Pipeline Orchestrator
tour.description: The orchestrator coordinates all 15 analysis layers, feeds findings to the brain, and produces the final pass/warn/block decision. It is the central hub with 40+ imports.

tour.title: Core Data Model
tour.description: models.py defines all shared types: Severity, Finding, DiffHunk, PipelineResult. Every module imports from here ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â it is the most-depended-upon file.

tour.title: Fuzzy Logic Brain
tour.description: The brain uses Interval Type-2 Fuzzy Inference (IT2-FIS) with 50 hand-crafted rules to aggregate findings into a pass/warn/block decision. Includes Bayesian second-opinion and project-level tuning.

tour.title: Analysis Layers (L0-L8)
tour.description: Each layer is an independent, idempotent analysis module. L0 covers fast hooks and CPG taint tracking; L1-L7 handle property tests, mutation, invariants, fuzzing, policy, symbolic execution, and simulation. L8 applies automatic fixes.

tour.title: Code Property Graph (CPG)
tour.description: Joern-inspired CPG merges AST + CFG + PDG into one graph. Enables cross-file taint tracking, unused variable detection, and dangerous pattern scanning.

tour.title: Detection Engines
tour.description: Key detection: metamorphic testing (oracle-free), differential testing (refactor verification), typestate analysis (state machine violations), LLM-as-oracle verification.

tour.title: Specialized Analyzers
tour.description: 60+ individual analyzers: crypto correctness, secrets detection, PII scanning, dead code, complexity metrics, FFI boundaries, supply chain vulnerabilities.

tour.title: Learning & Feedback Loop
tour.description: Closed-loop system: StatsTracker feeds per-layer precision into the brain, RuleCapture generates Semgrep rules from escaped bugs, active learning improves detection.

tour.title: Report & Output
tour.description: Multiple output formats: SARIF for GitHub Code Scanning, HTML dashboard, TUI interface, and JSON.

tour.title: Rule Packs
tour.description: 88 bundled Semgrep rules across 14 packs: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go, C++, React security, plus ported rules from detekt, lintr, luacheck, spotbugs.

tour.title: CI/CD & Integration
tour.description: GitHub Actions workflow runs STCA on pull requests, uploads SARIF to Code Scanning. Pre-commit hook and LSP server for IDE support.

project.name: stca-pipeline
project.description: Static + Test + Constraint Analysis — an offline, deterministic-first bug detection pipeline with a type-2 fuzzy aggregation brain
